title: Duke Kunshan hosts ‘truly global’ sports tournament
description: The inaugural DKU Invitational Sports Tournament brought together hundreds of students from five universities for two days of varsity competition.
text:
Duke Kunshan hosts ‘truly global’ sports tournament
The inaugural DKU Invitational Sports Tournament brought together hundreds of students from five universities for two days of varsity competition.
